results.title: Did Riyan Parag scold Vaibhav Sooryavanshi? Viral video sparks debate after RR's IPL exit
results.description: A viral video showing Riyan Parag's animated conversation with emotional teen star Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after Rajasthan Royals' IPL 2026 exit has sparked debate among cricket fans.

results.title: Sooryavanshi Gets Emotional as RR Exit IPL in Q2 Despite His 96
results.description: By every measure, Sooryavanshi concludes the season with a generational campaign, regardless of whether Sai Sudharsan or Shubman Gill surpass his run tally

results.title: Osmania University Hosts Online Awareness Programme on Knimbus Digital Library Platform
results.description: The programme focuses on enhancing digital resource literacy among faculty, students, and researchers. Vice‐Chancellor stresses adoption of modern technologies for academic excellence. Knimbus trainer explains advanced features, remote access, and e‐resource navigation.

results.title: PSG, Arsenal set for high-stakes Champions League final in Budapest
results.description: ANI | Updated: May 29, 2026 20:59 IST Budapest [Hungary], May 29 (ANI): Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) and Arsenal are set to face each other in the 2025-26 UEFA Champions League final, which will be held at the Puskas Arena in Budapest on Saturday.In their head-to-head history, PSG have a slight advantage against
